channel.title: Whalesbook Financial News
channel.description: Latest Indian and global financial market news

item.title: Innovision IPO Faces Risks: Debarment, Pricing Pressures Loom
item.description: Delhi-based Innovision launches its ₹323 crore IPO on March 10, 2026, with shares priced between ₹521 and ₹548. The offering includes fresh shares and an offer for sale. Funds will support debt repayment and working capital. Potential investors must assess significant risks including debarment notices, large workforce exposure, competitive pricing pressures, operational challenges, and revenue concentration in key segments.

item.title: ₹6 Lakh Vanishes: Bombay HC Judge Duped in Reward Points Scam
item.description: A Bombay High Court judge lost ₹6.02 lakh when tricked into redeeming credit card reward points via a fake WhatsApp file. Scammers posed as bank officials, leading the judge to download a malicious application and unwittingly share sensitive credit card data. The funds were immediately deducted. This incident highlights rampant phishing scams targeting financial information.

item.title: Redbrick Secures Massive 0.4M Sq Ft Pune Office Deal
item.description: Redbrick Offices has leased 0.4 million sq ft at AP4 Tech Park in Pune, marking one of the city's largest recent office transactions. This strategic move bolsters Redbrick's presence to cater to growing demand from global capability centers, IT firms, and startups. The provider aims to double its managed workspace area nationwide by 2028, reinforcing its 'Space-as-a-Service' model.

item.title: Goldman: Oil Rally to Ignite Chinese Energy Giants CNOOC, PetroChina
item.description: Goldman Sachs analysts anticipate escalating oil prices will benefit China National Offshore Oil Corporation (CNOOC) and PetroChina. This projection follows heightened tensions in the Middle East, which have driven Brent crude prices up by 28% last week. Both energy giants saw their shares reach 52-week highs on March 3rd.

item.title: DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Promoter Stake Rises to 50.11% via Gift
item.description: Promoter Madhav Bansidhar Shriram will acquire a 5.34% stake in DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd. via an inter-family gift by March 13, 2026. This move consolidates promoter holdings, boosting their total shareholding to 50.11% and is exempt from SEBI's open offer requirements, signalling a strengthening of promoter control within the immediate family.

item.title: Mohite Industries Appoints New Independent Director; Board Structure Tweaked
item.description: Mohite Industries Limited has updated its Board of Directors. Mr. Annasaheb Dhondiba More resigned as an Independent Director, effective March 9, 2026. The company has appointed Mr. Sangramsinh Subhashrao Nimbalkar as an Additional Independent Director, bringing over three decades of experience in construction projects. This appointment is subject to shareholder approval.

item.title: Kaiser Corp: Promoter Sells ₹44.3 Lakh Shares; Stake Now 8.31%
item.description: Kaiser Corporation Limited disclosed that its promoter entity, H L Rochat Engineering Private Limited, has sold 10,14,000 equity shares valued at ₹44.30 lakh. This transaction brings the promoter's shareholding down to 8.31%. The sale occurs amidst a broader trend of promoter divestment within the company.

item.title: KAMA Holdings Board to Consider Interim Dividend; Trading Window Closes
item.description: KAMA Holdings will convene a Board meeting on March 16, 2026, to evaluate a proposal for its second interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26. Concurrently, the company has announced a trading window closure for its directors and designated persons until March 18, 2026, to prevent insider trading during the dividend consideration period.

item.title: Cura Technologies Promoter Sells 0.05% Stake; Revival Efforts Continue
item.description: Promoter Boosa Ramreddy of Cura Technologies Limited has offloaded 5,000 equity shares, representing 0.05% of the total diluted share capital. This transaction, occurring on March 9, 2026, resulted in a slight reduction of his direct holding to 7.20% and the promoter group's overall stake to 74.94%. The sale comes as the company continues its revival efforts post-Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP).

item.title: GAIL India Appoints MoP&NG Joint Secretary Rohit Mathur as Govt Nominee Director
item.description: GAIL India Limited has announced the nomination of Shri Rohit Mathur, Joint Secretary at the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas (MoP&NG), as a Government Nominee Director on its Board. This appointment, effective March 9, 2026, for a three-year term, reinforces the government's direct participation in the strategic oversight of the state-owned energy giant.

item.title: Fractal Analytics BUY: Prabhudas Lilladher Sets ₹1110 Target Amid Sector Headwinds
item.description: Prabhudas Lilladher maintained a 'BUY' rating on Fractal Analytics, setting a target price of ₹1,110. The brokerage cited robust growth in ex-TMT verticals and margin expansion within Fractal.ai, offsetting softness in CPG and TMT sectors. The company's strategic pivot to an output-based model is also noted.

item.title: Coforge Wins ServiceNow APAC CRM Award; Boosts AI Expertise
item.description: Coforge Limited has secured the 2026 ServiceNow Partner Award for Domain Expertise in CRM for the APAC region. This recognition highlights the company's advanced capabilities in AI-led Customer Service Management (CSM) and CRM solutions on the ServiceNow AI Platform, reinforcing its position in modernizing workflows and enhancing customer experiences.

item.title: Shree Pushkar Schedules Non-Deal Roadshow in Mumbai
item.description: Shree Pushkar Chemicals & Fertilisers Ltd. has announced a physical Non-Deal Roadshow in Mumbai for March 13, 2026. The event aims to engage with investors, provide updates on the company's strategy, and discuss its business outlook. This proactive investor relations activity comes as the company reports a 15% year-on-year revenue growth and a 14% rise in PAT for Q3 FY26.

item.title: Landsmill Green Secures SEBI Name Change Nod; Trading Revenue ₹5.79 Cr
item.description: Landsmill Green Limited, formerly Excel Realty N Infra Limited, has received a SEBI compliance certificate for its proposed name change. The company confirmed it meets criteria including a year's gap since the last name change and sustained trading revenue of ₹5.79 crore as of December 31, 2025. This move officially transitions the company, though its core business activities remain unchanged for now.

item.title: Virinchi Subsidiary Stake Dilutes; Promoter Kompella Gains 49%
item.description: Virinchi Limited's subsidiary, Virinchi Health Care Private Limited, has seen its ownership structure change with the conversion of 52.22 lakh convertible warrants. Promoter Mr. Viswanath Kompella now holds a 49% stake, diluting Virinchi Limited's ownership to 51%. The conversion was based on an enterprise valuation of ₹312.08 Crore for the subsidiary.

item.title: Delhivery to Attend Bernstein AI Conference on Travel Tech Strategies
item.description: Delhivery Limited has announced its participation in a virtual investor conference hosted by Bernstein on March 16, 2026. The event, titled "AI-First Conversations: AI in Travel Tech and Growth Strategies," will focus on discussions using only publicly available information, ensuring no non-public price-sensitive disclosures. This engagement underscores Delhivery's proactive approach to investor relations and strategic communication within the evolving tech landscape.

item.title: MakeMyTrip AI Drives Longer Voice Queries, Reshaping Travel Search
item.description: MakeMyTrip's Gen-AI assistant, Myra, now handles over 50,000 daily conversations, revealing a significant shift in how Indians plan travel. Voice queries are substantially longer and more descriptive than typed searches, often including budget, dates, and amenities. This AI-driven trend is fostering greater language inclusivity and enabling more natural discovery of travel options.

item.title: Ashoka Buildcon Shareholders Re-appoint Directors; Katariya Becomes Chairman
item.description: Ashoka Buildcon's shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the re-appointment of Mr. Ashok Katariya as Whole-time Director and designated Chairman, and Ms. Shilpa Hiran as Independent Director. The strong voting outcomes signal shareholder confidence in experienced leadership, ensuring continuity in strategic direction for the infrastructure major.

item.title: Suraj Estate Developers: Promoter Buys 6,000 Shares, Stake Rises to 0.31%
item.description: Margarette Shwetha Thomas, a promoter group member of Suraj Estate Developers Limited, acquired 6,000 equity shares for ₹12.43 lakhs. This transaction increases her stake to 0.31%, signaling confidence from within the promoter group. The company, active in South-Central Mumbai's real estate market, recently saw strong operational performance.

item.title: HOCL Kochi Unit Halts Production Due to LPG Supply Snag; Phenol, Acetone Output Hit
item.description: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Limited (HOCL) has temporarily shut down key production units at its Kochi facility starting March 9, 2026. The disruption is caused by an LPG supply issue stemming from a recent government directive prioritizing LPG production for domestic use. This forces a halt in Phenol and Acetone manufacturing, impacting the company's output and leading to anticipated production losses and restart costs.

item.title: IT Village Completes Southern Latex Exit, Sells 4.86% Stake
item.description: IT Village.com Private Limited has completely divested its entire shareholding in Southern Latex Limited, selling 3,58,037 shares representing 4.86% of the voting capital. The transaction, disclosed on March 9, 2026, marks the end of IT Village's investment in Southern Latex, leaving its holding at zero.

item.title: NDR Auto Components Schedules Physical Investor Meeting March 12
item.description: NDR Auto Components Limited has announced a physical analyst and investor meeting scheduled for March 12, 2026, in Aerocity, Delhi. The engagement aims to foster direct dialogue between company leadership and stakeholders to discuss business strategies and future outlook. This event provides an opportunity for investors to gain deeper insights into the company's operations and plans.

item.title: Yarn Syndicate Board Approves Final Call on Partly Paid Shares
item.description: Yarn Syndicate Limited's Board of Directors has approved the first and final call of ₹13.50 per partly paid-up equity share. This move, with a record date set for March 27, 2026, aims to convert these shares into fully paid-up ones and finalize capital realization. Shareholders have until May 5, 2026, to make the payment.

item.title: Market Creators Shareholders Back Ms. Vaishali Shah's Director Appointment
item.description: Market Creators Ltd shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the appointment of Ms. Vaishali Kalpesh Shah as a Non-Independent and Whole Time Director. The postal ballot results showed 99.89% of votes in favour of the resolutions, signalling strong shareholder confidence in the leadership expansion.

item.title: Devyani International Acquires Full Stake in Sky Gate for ₹57.5 Cr
item.description: Devyani International announced the acquisition of an additional 11.4% equity stake in its subsidiary, Sky Gate Hospitality Private Limited, for ₹57.50 crore. This transaction, completed on March 7, 2026, makes Sky Gate a wholly-owned subsidiary, consolidating Devyani's control over its F&B operations. The consideration included ₹30 crore in Non-convertible Redeemable Preference Shares and ₹27.5 crore in cash.

item.title: AGS Transact Files Demat Compliance Certificate While Undergoing CIRP
item.description: AGS Transact Technologies, currently under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) since an NCLT order in August 2025, has submitted a SEBI compliance certificate. The filing confirms the processing of dematerialisation requests for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, by registrar MUFG Intime India Pvt. Ltd. This routine procedural step highlights continued adherence to regulatory norms despite the insolvency proceedings.

item.title: RailTel Declares 10% Interim Dividend, ₹1 Per Share Payout
item.description: RailTel Corporation of India's Board has approved a second interim dividend of 10% (₹1 per share) for FY 2025-26. The company has set March 13, 2026, as the record date for this payout, with the dividend to be paid on March 24, 2026. This marks another step in the Navratna PSU's commitment to shareholder returns.

item.title: KFIL Allots 35,575 Shares on ESOP Exercise; Capital Base Expands
item.description: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL) has allotted 35,575 equity shares of ₹5 face value on March 9, 2026, following the exercise of stock options by employees. This allotment has increased the company's total paid-up share capital to ₹82,46,08,215, reflecting an expansion in its equity base.

item.title: SVA India EGM Notice Corrigendum: Voting Cut-off Date Revised
item.description: SVA India Limited has issued a corrigendum to its Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) notice. The company revised the cut-off date for determining shareholder voting rights from March 6, 2026, to March 7, 2026, for the EGM scheduled for March 13, 2026. This administrative correction ensures accurate identification of eligible voters.

item.title: Marathon Nextgen Realty Promoter Buys 16,000 Shares for ₹0.69 Cr
item.description: Marathon Nextgen Realty Limited disclosed that promoter group member Ansuya Ramniklal Shah acquired 16,000 equity shares for ₹69.05 lakh on March 6, 2026. This transaction slightly increases her total shareholding to 79,600 shares, representing 0.118% of the company's equity. The move, compliant with SEBI insider trading norms, signals continued confidence from key stakeholders in the company's prospects.

item.title: Bombay HC: Companies Can Use Surname Defence Under Trademarks Act
item.description: The Bombay High Court has ruled that companies, not just individuals, can invoke the 'surname defence' under Section 35 of the Trademarks Act. The decision allows businesses to use a surname in their name if the usage is bona fide and reflects genuine business lineage, overturning a previous restriction that limited this protection to natural persons.

item.title: Lexoraa Industries Board Approves ₹30 Cr Capital Hike; Seeks Shareholder Nod
item.description: Lexoraa Industries' Board of Directors has approved a significant increase in the company's authorized share capital from ₹20 crore to ₹50 crore. This move aims to provide greater financial flexibility for future growth and expansion. The proposal now requires shareholder approval through an Ordinary Resolution at an upcoming Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM).

item.title: Info Edge Sets Investor Meetings March 12-20; No UPSI Shared
item.description: Info Edge (India) Limited will engage with institutional investors and analysts from March 12 to March 20, 2026. Key management, including Mr. Hitesh Oberoi and Mr. Vineet Ranjan, will participate. The company clarified that no unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) will be disclosed during these interactions, maintaining transparency while facilitating dialogue.

item.title: Western Press Frees 3.41% Foods & Inns Stake from Pledge
item.description: Western Press Private Limited has partially unwound its pledged shares in Foods & Inns Limited, releasing 25 lakh shares (3.41%) from encumbrance. This move signals reduced liability for the promoter, though 9 lakh shares (1.23%) still remain pledged. The disclosure comes amidst recent financial headwinds for Foods & Inns, where high debt and profit pressures have been noted.

item.title: Race Eco Chain Forms Green Energy Subsidiary
item.description: Race Eco Chain Limited has incorporated a new subsidiary, M/S. RACE GRASSLAND PRIVATE LIMITED, to venture into the recycling and green energy business, including biomass production. The company acquired a 51% stake for ₹7.65 lakh, marking a strategic step into a growing sector.

item.title: Suraj Industries Acquires 20.01% Stake in VRV Foods for ₹14.85 Cr
item.description: Suraj Industries Ltd has completed the acquisition of 22,50,000 equity shares in VRV Foods Limited for ₹14.85 crore. This strategic move makes VRV Foods an Associate Company, holding 20.01% of its paid-up equity capital. The transaction diversifies Suraj Industries' portfolio into the food processing sector.

item.title: Moneyboxx Finance Q3 FY26 Collections Up to 93.9%; Bounce Cases Decline
item.description: Moneyboxx Finance reported a robust 93.9% collection efficiency for Q3 FY26, with bounce cases falling to 17,900 in Feb'26. Resolution rates across various loan buckets showed marked improvement, signalling better asset quality management and operational efficiency. This update comes ahead of a required quarterly limited review by statutory auditors.

item.title: Uday Jewellery Amalgamation: 73 Lakh Shares Acquired, Shareholding Adjusted
item.description: Uday Jewellery Industries Limited has made a SEBI SAST disclosure regarding the acquisition of 73,34,305 equity shares. This transaction is part of the amalgamation scheme with Narbada Gems and Jewellery Limited, where Uday Jewellery is the transferee company. The acquisition led to an adjustment in the collective shareholding of acquirers and persons acting in concert (PAC) to 74.38% from 74.91%, reflecting changes in the company's capital structure.

item.title: Westlife Foodworld: Promoter Horizon Impex Increases Stake to 56.31%
item.description: Horizon Impex Private Limited, a promoter of Westlife Foodworld Limited, acquired 34,010 equity shares through open market purchases. This transaction, occurring between March 4-5, 2026, marginally increased its total holding to 56.31%. The move reinforces the promoter group's significant majority control over the quick-service restaurant (QSR) operator.

item.title: SFO Technologies Secures $82 Million to Fuel Expansion
item.description: SFO Technologies Private Limited has secured $82 million in a funding round led by Trident Growth Partners and Amicus Capital. Existing investors Anicut Capital and HDFC Asset Management Capital also participated. The capital infusion will drive the electronics manufacturing services provider's expansion and strategic goals.
